Notice Of Motion And Motion For Return Of Privileged Documents; Expungement Of Exhibit A To Pltf'S Complaint From Court'S Record
Off Calendar Dec-07-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JASON J. GALEK OF MURPHY PEARSON BRADLEY & FEENEY, TEL. NO. 788-1900 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CLAYTON CHANG'S Motion For Return Of Privileged Documents; Expungement Of Exhibit A To Plaintiff'S Complaint From Court'S Record IS Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. =302/HEK
